title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 26.510 - Plans, when effective — disapproval by resolution, when
text:
26.510.  Plans, when effective — disapproval by resolution, when. — A reorganization plan so submitted shall become effective by executive order not sooner than ninety days after the final adjournment of the session of the legislature to which it is submitted, unless it is disapproved within sixty days of its submission to a regular session by a senate or house resolution adopted by a majority vote of the respective elected members thereof.
(L. 1967 p. 98 § 2)
